Welcome to the Robotics and Automation at UTSA

Tell Me More

About Us

Hello! We are here to serve the UTSA community with workshops, projects and outreach events to get you the experience and contacts in robotics.

Workshops

Google Calendar

Workshops are aimed at beginners and are free for anyone to attend. We will be posting our workshops in our Google calendar. You can access the Google calenar by clicking the button above. Below you can check our past and upcoming workshops with their descriptions.

Raspberry Pi

Projects

A project pass must be obtained before joining any open projects. The project pass is $15/semester or $25/year. You can purchase the Project Pass by cash to a RAS officer in the IEEE parts bin (EB 2.04.08) or through our Venmo and include your Name, ABC123, and UTSA email in your memo. Once you have paid, please fill out the Paid Member Form. Form and payment will be processed after you submit it, contact an officer if no change in membership occurs within two days. Once you are a member you can join any open project so say hi and have fun!
